exercises.title: Compound Stress
exercises.instruction: Practice stress in compound words and phrases.
exercises.targetText: Let's set up a follow-up meeting.

exercises.title: Consonant Clusters
exercises.instruction: Practice linking words with consonant clusters.
exercises.targetText: I'll ask_about the details when we meet.
tips: The 'k' sound connects smoothly to the 'a' in about

exercises.title: Numbered Lists
exercises.instruction: Break this list into clear thought groups.
exercises.targetText: We have three priorities. One, completing the project. Two, managing the budget. Three, communicating with stakeholders.
tips: Use numbers to structure your points
Each number + point is a thought group
Stress: three, priorities, completing, project, managing, budget, communicating, stakeholders

exercises.title: Rhythmic Flow
exercises.instruction: Shadow to practice natural rhythmic flow.
exercises.targetText: We need to move forward with the decision.
tips: Keep the rhythm steady and flowing
Speak along with the model, don't wait

exercises.title: Emphasis through Pitch
exercises.instruction: Use intonation to emphasize important words.
exercises.targetText: This is a great opportunity for our team.
tips: Use extra pitch and volume on key words: great, opportunity, team
Keep function words lower and quieter
